records.category: Mīm: Thirty-eight men (transl. note: there are only thirty five listed below)
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 35 – Muḥammad b. Nuṣayr.  Abū Muḥammad b. Ṭalḥa b. ʿAlī b. ʿAbdullāh b. ʿAlālah said to me: Abū Bakr al-Jaʿābī said to us: Muḥammad b. Nuṣayr was from the virtuous folks of Basra in knowledge.  And he was weak.  He started the Nusayriyya, and to him they are attributed – the end (of this section), and this is from the speech of the sayyid رضي اP عنه .  And maybe he dropped from its aforementioned number first of all, then there is no mistake that what is found here is thirty four.
records.arabicText: 35 - محمد بن نصير. قال لي أبو محمد ابن طلحة بن علي بن عبد الله بن علاله: قال لنا أبو بكر الجعابي: كان محمد بن نصير من أفاضل أهل البصرة علما. وكان ضعيفا. بدء النصيرية، وإليه ينسبون. (انتهى. وهذا كلام السيد (رحمه الله). ولعله قد سقط من عدتها المذكورة أولا؛ إذ لا غلط أن الموجود هنا أربعة وثلاثون).

records.category: Wāw: One man
records.chapter: Wahb b. Wahb b. ʿAbdullāh b. Zamaʿa b. al-Aswad b. al-Muṭṭalib b. ʿAbd al-ʿUzā, Abū alBakhtarī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 1 – Wahb b. Wahb b. ʿAbdullāh b. Zamaʿa b. al-Aswad b. al-Muṭṭalib b. ʿAbd al-ʿUzā, Abū alBakhtarī, the judge.  A liar, an ʿāmī, except that he has ḥadīth from Jaʿfar b. Muḥammad عليه السلام none of them are to be relied upon.
records.arabicText: 1 - وهب بن وهب بن عبد الله بن زمعة بن الأسود بن المطلب بن عبد العزى، أبو البختري، القاضي. كذاب، عامي، إلا أن له عن جعفر بن محمد (عليه السلام) أحاديث كلها لا يوثق بها.

records.category: Yā: Seven men
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 1 – Yūnus b. Zhabyan, Kufan.  A ghālī, a liar and a fabricator of ḥadīth.  He narrated from Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام .  His ḥadīth are not turned to.
records.arabicText: 1 - يونس بن ظبيان، كوفي. غال، كذاب وضاع للحديث. روى عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام). لا يلتفت إلى حديثه.

records.category: Yā: Seven men
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 2 – Yūnus b. Bahman. A ghālī, a Khaṭṭābī.  Kufan.  He fabricates ḥadīth.  He narrated from Abū ʿAbdillāh . عليه السلام
records.arabicText: 2 - يونس بن بهمن. غال، خطابي، كوفي يضع الحديث. روى عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام).

records.category: Yā: Seven men
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 3 – Yaʿqūb b. al-Sarrāj.  Kufan.  He has a narration from Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام .  Weak.
records.arabicText: 3 - يعقوب بن السراج، كوفي. وله رواية عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام). ضعيف.

records.category: Yā: Seven men
records.chapter: Yaḥyā b. Muḥammad b. ʿAlīm, al-Ḥalabī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 4 – Yaḥyā b. Muḥammad b. ʿAlīm, al-Ḥalabī.  He narrated from Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام .  Weak.
records.arabicText: 4 - يحيى بن محمد بن عليم، الحلبي. روى عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام). ضعيف.

records.category: Yā: Seven men
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 5 – Yūsuf b. Yaʿqūb, al-Juʿfī.  He narrated from Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام and Jābir.  Weak, a proponent of irtifāʿ in doctrine.
records.arabicText: 5 - يوسف بن يعقوب، الجعفي. روى عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام) وجابر. ضعيف، مرتفع القول.

records.category: Yā: Seven men
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 6 – Yūsuf b. al-Sakht.  Basran.  Weak, a proponent of irtifāʿ in doctrine, the Qummis excluded him from “Nawādir al-Ḥikma”.
records.arabicText: 6 - يوسف بن السخت، بصري. ضعيف، مرتفع القول، استثناه القميون من " نوادر الحكمة ".

records.category: Yā: Seven men
records.chapter: Yaḥyā b. Zakariyya, al-Tarmāshīrī, Abū al-Ḥusayn
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 7 – Yaḥyā b. Zakariyya, al-Tarmāshīrī, Abū al-Ḥusayn.  A fabricator.
records.arabicText: 7 - يحيى بن زكريا، الترماشيري، أبو الحسين. وضاع.

records.category: The kunya: One man
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 1 – Abū Talib, al-Azdī, al-Baṣrī, al-Shaʿrānī.  He has a book that Muḥammad b. Khālid al-Barqī narrates.  Our companions said: This man is not known except from his direction.
records.arabicText: 1 - أبو طالب، الأزدي، البصري، الشعراني. وله كتاب يرويه محمد بن خالد البرقي. قال أصحابنا: لا يعرف هذا الرجل إلا من جهته.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 1 – Jābir b. Yazīd, al-Juʿfī, al-Kūfī.  Thiqa in himself, however most of those who narrate from him are weak.  Of those who (narrate) the most from him of the weak narrators, there are: ʿAmr b. Shimr al-Juʿfī, Mufaḍḍal b. Ṣāliḥ, al-Sakūnī, and Munakhkhal b. Jamīl al-Asadī.
records.arabicText: 1 - جابر بن يزيد، الجعفي، الكوفي. ثقة في نفسه. ولكن جل من يروي عنه ضعيف، فممن أكثر عنه من الضعفاء، عمرو بن شمر الجعفي، ومفضل بن صالح، والسكوني، ومنخل بن جميل الأسدي.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: al-Ḥusayn b. al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 2 – al-Ḥusayn b. al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn.  They have weakened him, but according to me he is thiqa.  However there is discussion in regards to those who narrate from him.  And his father, al-Qāsim, was from the noteworthy of the Shīʿa, however nothing has been narrated from him.
records.arabicText: 2 - الحسين بن القاسم بن محمد بن أيوب بن شمون. ضعفوه. وهو عندي ثقة. ولكن بحث في من يروي عنه. وكان أبوه القاسم من وجوه الشيعة، ولكن لم يرو شيئا.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Ḥabīb b. Aws, Abū Tammām, al-Ṭā’ī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 3 – Ḥabīb b. Aws, Abū Tammām, al-Ṭā’ī.  I have seen an ancient manuscript that might have been written for him in his time or close to it.  In it, there is an poem (qaṣīda) mentioning the Imams عليهم السbم in it until it reaches Abū Jaʿfar the Second  عليه السلام , since he died during his time.
records.arabicText: 3 - حبيب بن أوس، أبو تمام، الطائي. رأيت نسخة عتيقة لعلها كتبت له في أيامه أو قريبا منها، فيها قصيدة يذكر فيها الأئمة (عليهم السلام) حتى انتهى إلى أبي جعفر الثاني (عليه السلام) لأنه توفي في أيامه.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 4 – Ibn ʿUqda.  He is from the Zaydīs, however his ḥadīth come in the ḥadīth of our companions.
records.arabicText: 4 - ابن عقدة. هو من الزيدية، لكن حديثه يجيئ في حديث أصحابنا.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: ʿUmar b. Abī al-Miqdām, Thābit al-ʿIjlī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 5 - ʿUmar b. Abī al-Miqdām, Thābit al-ʿIjlī, their client, al-Kūfī.  He narrated from ʿAlī b. alḤusayn [and Abū Jaʿfar and Abū ʿAbdillāh عليهم السbم ].  (Scholars) have accused him on the one hand, but according to me he is not as they have claimed, and according to me he is thiqa.
records.arabicText: 5 - عمر بن أبي المقدام، ثابت العجلي مولاهم، الكوفي. روى عن علي بن الحسين، (وأبي جعفر، وأبي عبد الله (عليهم السلام)) طعنوا عليه من جهة، وليس عندي كما زعموا. وهو عندي ثقة.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Layth b. al-Bakhtarī al-Murādī, Abū Baṣīr
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 6 – Layth b. al-Bakhtarī al-Murādī, Abū Baṣīr, known by the kunya of Abū Muḥammad.  Abū ʿAbdillāh  عليه السلام used to be displeased with him and be fed up (with him).  And his companions are at variance regarding his state.  According to me, the accusation is only occurred against his religion, not against his ḥadīth, and according to me he is thiqa.
records.arabicText: 6 - ليث بن البختري، المرادي، أبو بصير، يكنى أبا محمد. كان أبو عبد الله (عليه السلام) يتضجر به ويتبرم، وأصحابه مختلفون في شأنه. وعندي أن الطعن إنما وقع على دينه، لا على حديثه، وهو عندي ثقة.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Aḥmad b. Hilāl, al-ʿAbartā’ī, Abū Jaʿfar
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 7 – Aḥmad b. Hilāl, al-ʿAbartā’ī, Abū Jaʿfar.  I regard halting (to be appropriate) in regards to his ḥadīth, except for what he narrates from al-Ḥasan b. Maḥbūb from the book al-Mashīkha and Muḥammad b. Abī ʿUmayr from his Nawādir.  The venerable of the Aṣḥāb al-Ḥadīth have heard these two books and relied upon what is in them.  He was born in the year 180, and died in the year 267.
records.arabicText: 7 - أحمد بن هلال، العبرتائي، أبو جعفر. أرى التوقف في حديثه، إلا في ما يرويه عن الحسن بن محبوب من كتاب " المشيخة "، ومحمد بن أبي عمير من " نوادره " وقد سمع هذين الكتابين جلة أصحاب الحديث واعتمدوه فيهما. ولد سنة ثمانين ومئة، ومات سنة سبع وستين ومئتين.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Aḥmad b. al-Qāsim b. Ṭarkhān, Abū al-Sarrāj
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 8 – Aḥmad b. al-Qāsim b. Ṭarkhān, Abū al-Sarrāj.  Weak.
records.arabicText: 8 - أحمد بن القاسم بن طرخان، أبو السراج. ضعيف.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 9 – al-Ḥusayn b. Mayyāḥ, al-Madā’inī.  Narrated from his father.  A ghālī, weak.
records.arabicText: 9 - الحسين بن مياح، المدايني. روى عن أبيه. غال، ضعيف.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: al-Ḥusayn b. al-Mukhāriq b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān b. Warqā b. Ḥabash, Abū Junāda, al-Salūlī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 10 – al-Ḥusayn b. al-Mukhāriq b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān b. Warqā b. Ḥabash, Abū Junāda, al-Salūlī.  Weak.  And Ibn ʿUqda said he used to fabricate ḥadīth.  He was from the Zaydīs, however his ḥadīth come in the ḥadīth of our companions.
records.arabicText: 10 - الحصين بن المخارق بن عبد الرحمان بن ورقاء بن حبش، أبو جنادة السلولي. ضعيف، وقال ابن عقدة: كان يضع الحديث. وهو من الزيدية، لكن حديثه يجيئ في حديث أصحابنا -.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 11 – Rabiʿ b. Zakariyya, al-Warrāq (the papermaker).  Kufan.  Weak.
records.arabicText: 11 - ربيع بن زكريا، الوراق، كوفي. ضعيف.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Sulaymān b. ʿUmar, Abū Dāwud, al-Nakhaʿī
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 12 – Sulaymān b. ʿUmar, Abū Dāwud, al-Nakhaʿī.  Narrated from Abū ʿAbdillāh   . عليه السلام Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. Mūsā narrated to me, he said: Aḥmad b. Muḥammad b. Saʿīd narrated to me, he said: The muḥaddiths used to nickname Abū Dāwud “the liar of al-Nakhaʿ”
records.arabicText: 12 - سليمان بن عمر، أبو داوود، النخعي. روى عن أبي عبد الله (عليه السلام). حدثني أحمد بن محمد بن موسى، قال: حدثنا أحمد بن محمد بن سعيد، قال: كان أبو داوود النخعي يلقبه المحدثون: " كذاب النخع ".

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 13 – Sulaymān b. Yaʿqūb, al-Nakhaʿī.  Muḥammad b. al-Ḥusayn b. Muḥammad b. al-Faḍl narrated to me, he said: ʿAbdullāh b. Jaʿfar b. Durustawayh narrated to me, he said: Yaʿqūb b. Sufyān said: Sulaymān b. Yaʿqūb al-Nakhaʿī used to keep to (? lie upon) the waqf.
records.arabicText: 13 - سليمان بن يعقوب، النخعي. حدثني محمد بن الحسين بن محمد بن الفضل، قال: حدثني عبد الله ابن جعفر بن درستويه، قال: قال يعقوب بن سفيان: كان سليمان بن يعقوب النخعي يكذب على الوقف.
records.thaqalaynSanad: 13 – Sulaymān b. Yaʿqūb, al-Nakhaʿī.  Muḥammad b. al-Ḥusayn b. Muḥammad b. al-Faḍl narrated to me, he said: ʿAbdullāh b. Jaʿfar b. Durustawayh narrated to me, he said: Yaʿqūb b. Sufyān said:
records.thaqalaynMatn: Sulaymān b. Yaʿqūb al-Nakhaʿī used to keep to (? lie upon) the waqf.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 14 - ʿAlī b. Ḥassān, al-Wāsiṭī.  From our companions, thiqa thiqa.
records.arabicText: 14 - علي بن حسان، الواسطي. من أصحابنا، ثقة، ثقة.

records.category: Addendum, Material quoted from Ibn al-Ghaḍā’irī by other authors (al-Najāshī, ʿAllāma Ḥillī and Ibn Dāwud) but not found within the Kitāb al-Ḍuʿafa.
records.chapter: Sālim b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān, Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān
records.author: Abū al-Ḥusayn Aḥmad b. al-Ḥusayn al-Ghaḍā'irī
records.englishText: 15 – Sālim b. ʿAbd al-Raḥmān, Abū ʿAbd al-Raḥmān, the lame.  Thiqa.  Narrated from Abū Jaʿfar and Abū ʿAbdillāh .عليهما السbم
records.arabicText: 15 - سالم بن عبد الرحمان، أبو عبد الرحمان، الأشل. ثقة. روى عن أبي جعفر، وأبي عبد الله (عليهما السلام).
